name: attach_hockey_stick
description: Attaches a hockey stick to the robot hand for striking objects.
source_code:
async def attach_hockey_stick():
    return await attach_gripper(gripper_xml='<body name="hockey_stick" pos="0 0 0.11"><geom type="cylinder" size="0.025 0.15" rgba="0.4 0.2 0.1 1" mass="0.08"/></body>', tcp_offset="0 0 0.26")
